notes: Multi Studio version 2.1.34: Completion Safeguards (script blocks can only be marked as completed once their audio segment is fully rendered), Auto-Reset on Editing (editing block text or regenerating audio automatically unchecks completed status for re-review), Block Splitting Shortcut (press Cmd+Enter, Alt+Enter, or Ctrl+Enter inside any text area to split a block into two separate blocks at cursor position), Mark All Completed toolbar button to review and check off all rendered audio blocks at once, Per-Block SRT Subtitle Export inside project ZIP archives, Smooth Block Expand & Collapse transitions with unified typography, Fluid Drag-and-Drop Reordering with capped edge auto-scrolling speed, Memory-Free Audio Export delegating MP3 assembly directly to native desktop backend, Preserved Custom Block Names during drag reordering, Silent Flow without intrusive toast popups when toggling block completion.
